title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week focused on major infrastructure improvements and new automation capabilities. We launched intelligent workflow guidance that learns from your RevOps processes and suggests optimizations, plus expanded our Windows support for easier onboarding. Security was strengthened with automated credential scanning, and Salesforce deployments became more reliable with enhanced validation checks.

entries.headline: Smart workflow opportunity detection tracks and improves your processes
details: OpsPal now automatically identifies improvement opportunities in your workflows
Tracks success rates and suggests optimizations based on your team's usage patterns

entries.headline: Automatic workflow documentation creates guides from your operations
details: OpsPal watches how you complete tasks and builds step-by-step runbooks automatically
New documentation appears in your workspace within seconds of completing operations

entries.headline: Salesforce deployments now include three safety checks before going live
details: Added validation for required lookup fields and flow element ordering
Prevents deployment failures that could disrupt your sales processes

entries.headline: Intelligent runbook system organizes and prioritizes your process documentation
details: Automatically categorizes procedures by business area and confidence level
Creates searchable library of your most effective RevOps workflows

entries.headline: License validation works reliably during network interruptions
Salesforce automation routing works more reliably
Salesforce operations now track completion across all automation types
details: Added verification for workflow rules and flow operations
Extended tracking support to HubSpot and Marketo integrations

entries.headline: HubSpot and Marketo operations now provide execution confirmations
details: You can verify that automation changes completed successfully across all platforms
Standardized completion tracking works the same way for Salesforce, HubSpot, and Marketo

entries.headline: Salesforce process discovery provides better execution tracking
details: Flow and workflow analysis now confirms each step completed successfully
Better visibility into which automation discovery steps succeeded or failed

entries.headline: Salesforce automation inventory tracking covers all operation types
details: Apex triggers, classes, and flows now provide complete execution confirmations
Better visibility into what automation discovery found in your org

entries.headline: Production org safeguards allow safe data retrieval operations
details: You can now safely retrieve and examine Salesforce metadata in production
Read-only operations no longer trigger unnecessary production warnings

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of platform updates
details: Weekly summaries highlight changes that impact your RevOps workflows
Release information automatically appears in your dashboard with clear explanations

entries.headline: Salesforce permission management handoffs work smoothly
Salesforce operations work more reliably with fewer false blocking errors
details: Reduced unnecessary routing restrictions that prevented valid operations
Added bypass options for common RevOps tasks that were incorrectly blocked

entries.headline: Simple Salesforce record lookups work without complex routing
details: Single record queries and small data retrievals work immediately
Faster access to basic Salesforce information for your analysis

entries.headline: Windows setup now installs all required tools automatically
details: One-step installation handles Claude Code, Node.js, and other dependencies
Windows users get the same smooth setup experience as Mac and Linux

entries.headline: Windows installation handles multiple software versions correctly
Platform reliability improvements resolve task completion issues
details: Better detection of successful operations vs. error conditions
More accurate reporting when automation tasks complete successfully

entries.headline: Smart error detection identifies and reports Salesforce connection issues
details: Automatically detects when Salesforce authentication fails
Provides clear guidance when org connections need attention

entries.headline: Windows installation works reliably when run from web browsers
details: PowerShell setup script handles browser-based installation correctly
Eliminates installation failures when running setup from download links

entries.headline: Platform reliability improvements with expanded testing coverage
details: Enhanced validation across 21 different operation types
Better compatibility with Salesforce CLI variations and configurations

entries.headline: Operation reliability improvements across all platform integrations
details: Fixed execution issues in Salesforce, HubSpot, and AI consultation workflows
Enhanced compatibility testing ensures consistent behavior across tools

entries.headline: Production Salesforce orgs allow safe read-only operations
Revenue analysis results save properly for future reference
Customizable templates and branding survive platform updates
details: Your custom templates and brand settings persist through OpsPal upgrades
Tenant-specific customizations take priority over default settings

entries.headline: Revenue field discovery automatically adapts to your Salesforce setup
details: OpsPal detects your org's revenue fields and sales processes automatically
RevOps assessments use your actual field names instead of generic defaults

entries.headline: Windows setup prefers Git Bash for better compatibility
Setup automatically installs required dependencies
Windows users get dedicated PowerShell setup experience
Better onboarding experience with improved setup detection
Advanced Salesforce deployment validation prevents configuration errors
details: Validates picklist values, record types, and field history settings before deployment
Prevents deployment failures that could break your sales processes

entries.headline: Automatic credential scanning prevents accidental data exposure
Enhanced security scanning protects your credentials
Improved credential security removes hardcoded access keys
Salesforce deployment validation works reliably across all flow types
details: Fixed logic analysis and field reference validation in complex flows
Eliminates false errors that prevented valid Salesforce deployments
